--- state.rs (before)	snapshot
+++ state.rs (after)	external
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+// state
+
+pub struct RunState{
+    // current hidden state
+    pub x: Vec<f32>,
+
+    // residual branch buffers
+    pub xb: Vec<f32>,
+    pub xb2: Vec<f32>,
+
+    // FFN hidden buffers
+    pub hb: Vec<f32>,
+    pub hb2: Vec<f32>,
+
+    // attention
+    pub q: Vec<f32>,
+    pub k: Vec<f32>,
+    pub v: Vec<f32>,
+
+    // attention score
+    pub att: Vec<f32>,
+
+    // final logits
+    pub logits: Vec<f32>,
+
+    // KV cache
+    pub key_cache: Vec<f32>,
+    pub value_cache: Vec<f32>,
+}
+
